stemHtml: Merging and processing data from gridded forecasts, automatic aircraft detection and reports from pilots is useful because:

options.a: It helps to increase the accuracy of METAR and TAF.
options.b: It can be used by WAFC’s to update published SWC.
options.c: It can be provided to flight crew through their EFB for more situational awareness.
options.d: It reduces margin of error in numerical weather prediction.
